app.name: Lumina Note
app.one_liner: A local-first, AI-enhanced Markdown note-taking desktop application that keeps your data on-device while enabling knowledge graph features and optional AI augmentation.

screens.name: Main Editor
screens.purpose: Compose, preview, and link Markdown notes with access to AI assistant modes.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a note or metadata change to the local vault.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add basic editor with live preview
week 1: Implement local Markdown file storage
week 1: Set up Tauri + React scaffold
acceptance_tests: AI assistant modes are accessible only when explicitly enabled by the user.
User can create and save a Markdown note that persists after app restart.
